title: North West Provincial Gazette vol 255 no 6974 dated 16 March 2012

NORTH WEST

BUITENGEWONE
PROVINSIALE KOERANT
Vol. 255 16 MARCH 2012 No. 6974
MAART

2 No.6974 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 16 MARCH 2012
IMPORTANT NOTICE
The Government Printing Works will not be held responsible for faxed documents not received due
to errors on the fax machine or faxes received which are unclear or incomplete. Please be advised
that an "OK" slip, received from a fax machine, will not be accepted as proof that documents were
received by the GPW for printing. If documents are faxed to the GPW it will be the sender's respon
sibility to phone and confirm that the documents were received in good order.
Furthermore the Government Printing Works will also not be held responsible for cancellations and
amendments which have not been done on original documents received from clients.

GENERAL NOTICE
184 North West Gambling Act (212001): North West Gambling Board: Application for a Certificate of Suitability by Fidelity
Security Services (Ply) Ltd, to provide gambling related security services to Sun International South Africa Limited
trading as Sun City Casino Resorts ............................................................................................................................... 3 6974

BUITENGEWONE PROVINSIALE KOERANT, 16 MAART 2012 No.6974 3
GENERAL NO-riCE
NOTICE 184 OF 2012
NClRY .... w~aT
GAMS .... ING SCARe
NOTICE IN TERMS OF SECTION 29 OF THE NORTH WEST GAMBLING ACT, 2001
APPLICATION FOR A CERTIFICATE OF SUITABILITY
BY fiDELITY SECURITY SERVICES (Ply) Ltd, TO PROVIDE GAMBLING RELATED SECURITY SERVICES
TO SUN IN"rERNATIONAL SOUTH AFRICA LIMITED trading as, SUN CITY CASINO RESORTS
Notice is hereby given in terms of the provisions of section 29 of the North West Gambling
Act, 2001 (Act No.2 of 2001), as amended, that the North West Gambling Board ("the
Board") received an application from Fidelity Security Services (Pty) Ltd, for a Certificate of
Suitability to provide security services to Sun International South Africa Limited, trading as
Sun City Casino Resorts.
The Board is enjoined by the provisions of section 29 of the North West Gambling Act,
2001 (Act No.2 of 2001) as amended, to cause a notice of this application to be published
in the Provincial Gazette and newspapers circulating in the district in which the premises to
which the application relates are situated, and further invite interested persons to lodge
their written representations in relation to the said application.
The provisions of section 78{1) of the North West Gambling Act, 2001 (Act 2 of 2001), as
amended, states that, "the Board may prohibit 0 licensee from contracting with any
supplier for the purchase of goods or services in terms of this Act, including the rental of
premises, or with any lender, until such supplier or lender has obtained a certificate of
suitability from the Board and paid the expenses of the Board relative thereto".
Fidelity Security Services (Pty) Ltd is a private company registered with the Private
Security Industry Regulatory Authority to provide security and related services. The
business address of Fidelity is Fidelity Corporate Park, 1040 Mimosa Street, Helderkruin,
Roodepoort.
Please take note that the application submitted by this company will lie for public viewing
in terms of the provisions section 32, of the North West Gambling Act, 2001( Act No.2 of
2001}, as amended at the offices of the Board (23 First Street, Industrial Site,
MAHIKENG), between 08h30 -16h30, for a period of one (1) month, commencing on
01 April 2012 to 30 April 2012.

4 No. 6974 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 16 MARCH 2012
Persons wishing to make representations, be either comments or objections, in relation to
the application submitted by Fidelity Security Services (Pty) Ltd to the Board, shall do so in
writing and such representations shall contain the following information:
a) The grounds on which representations are made;
b) The name, address, telephone, and facsimile numbers of the person submitting
representations; and .
c) Whether or not the person making representations wish to make an oral
presentation at the hearing of the applications.
Written objections should be lodged with the Chief Executive Officer, Mr Fortune
Sekgaphane by facsimile, email, hand delivery or post: Facsimile Number: 018 381 4422,
Email: ceo@nwgb.co.za. North West Gambling Board, 23 First Street, Industrial Site,
MAHIKENG, Private Bag X 34, MMABATHO, 2735, from 01 April 2012 to 30 April 2012.
Enquiries: Mrs Qhinaphi Sitsila (Tel. No: 018-3815307)
